category_title: Years 7 and 8 boys with literacy underachievement and behavioral challenges
scenario_title: Managing mistakes during challenging academic tasks
minimal_context: The student is assigned a long maths worksheet to complete independently at his desk.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start on the maths worksheet on your desk. There are thirty problems to complete before the end of the period.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: That's lots of work. It's just boring stuff.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone has to complete it. Please get started.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't even know how to do the first one. If I get it wrong, the kids that get on your nerves are going to see it. I want to be where no one laugh at you.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best and write down an answer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Crumples up the worksheet and throws it at the boy sitting at the next desk) I'm not doing it! I hate having to do stuff!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start on the maths worksheet on your desk. There are thirty problems to complete before the end of the period.

STUDENT: That's lots of work. It's just boring stuff.

TUTOR: Everyone has to complete it. Please get started.

STUDENT: I don't even know how to do the first one. If I get it wrong, the kids that get on your nerves are going to see it. I want to be where no one laugh at you.

TUTOR: Just try your best and write down an answer.

STUDENT: (Crumples up the worksheet and throws it at the boy sitting at the next desk) I'm not doing it! I hate having to do stuff!

task.content: Completing 'lots of work' in subjects like maths or writing
task.learning_goal: Strive to have achieved, by year's end, more than mediocre standards

context.social_setting: Boys only class where they have a lot in common with others

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Making mistakes during learning or facing 'boring stuff' and 'lots of work'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Anti-social behaviour, getting told off, or behaviors that previously led to being removed from class
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Lack of positive experiences in school; fear of being laughed at

behavior_patterns.condition: When struggling with academic tasks or social interactions
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Lacking confidence in their ability to complete planned tasks
